column1: - Don't worry about getting to the airport, Joe. I _____ take you.
He__________a birthday party on Saturday. Everything is ready for it.
Look at those grey clouds. It ______ rain.
What are your plans for your future job? - I________a famous actress.
My wife and children ___________ all over the world. They bought the tickets yesterday.
Everything is planned. I ___________a flying school in England.
- Are you ready to order? - Yes, I  ______  take a sandwich and a coffee.
She thinks she _________ a good mark at the English lesson.
I  think I ____  be rich one day.
The children are at their grandma's house today. They __________ to her stories tonight.

- There’s somebody at the door.
- Don’t worry, I _____ see who’s there.
